# Finansdepartementet

*109 lover*

| Lov | Korttittel | Ikrafttredelse | Historikk |
|-----|-----------|----------------|-----------|
| [Lov om Bankenes sikringsfond](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2018-03-23-3.md) | Lov om Bankenes sikringsfond | 2019-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2018-03-23-3.md) |
| [Lov om EØS-finanstilsyn](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2016-06-17-30.md) | Lov om EØS-finanstilsyn | 2016-10-03, 2017-01-01, Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2016-06-17-30.md) |
| [Lov om Finanstilsynet (finanstilsynsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2024-06-21-41.md) | Finanstilsynsloven | 2025-04-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2024-06-21-41.md) |
| [Lov om Folketrygdfondet](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2007-06-29-44.md) | Folketrygdfondloven | 2008-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2007-06-29-44.md) |
| [Lov om Norges Bank og pengevesenet mv. (sentralbankloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2019-06-21-31.md) | Sentralbankloven | 2019-07-01, 2020-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2019-06-21-31.md) |
| [Lov om Riksrevisjonen](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2004-05-07-21.md) | Riksrevisjonsloven – rrevl | 2004-07-01, 2005-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2004-05-07-21.md) |
| [Lov om Riksrevisjonen (riksrevisjonsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2024-12-13-77.md) | Riksrevisjonsloven | 2025-01-01, 2025-10-01, 2026-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2024-12-13-77.md) |
| [Lov om Statens finansfond](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2009-03-06-12.md) | Statens finansfond-loven | 2009-03-06 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2009-03-06-12.md) |
| [Lov om Statens fond i Tromsø](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2024-06-25-67.md) | Lov om Statens fond i Tromsø | 2024-08-09 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2024-06-25-67.md) |
| [Lov om Statens innkrevingssentral (SI-loven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2013-01-11-3.md) | SI-loven | 2013-06-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2013-01-11-3.md) |
| [Lov om Statens obligasjonsfond](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2020-03-27-12.md) | Lov om Statens obligasjonsfond | 2020-03-27 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2020-03-27-12.md) |
| [Lov om Statens pensjonsfond](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2005-12-21-123.md) | Statens pensjonsfond-loven | 2006-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2005-12-21-123.md) |
| [Lov om adgang for Kongen til å inngå overenskomster med fremmede stater til fore](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1949-07-28-15.md) | Dobbeltbeskatningsavtaleloven | 1949-07-28 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1949-07-28-15.md) |
| [Lov om adgang for staten til utferdigelse av premieobligasjonslån](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1924-06-13-4.md) | Lov om statens premieobligasjonslån | 1924-06-13 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1924-06-13-4.md) |
| [Lov om adgang til regulering av penge- og kredittforholdene [kredittloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1965-06-25-2.md) | Kredittloven – pkrregll | 1965-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1965-06-25-2.md) |
| [Lov om ansvar og garanti for statens oppkrevere og regnskapsførere m.v.](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1958-03-28-4.md) | Lov om statens oppkrevere m.v. |  | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1958-03-28-4.md) |
| [Lov om arbeidsgivers innrapportering av ansettelses- og inntektsforhold m.m. (a-](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2012-06-22-43.md) | A-opplysningsloven | 2015-01-01, 2014-09-26 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2012-06-22-43.md) |
| [Lov om avgift på utslipp av CO2i petroleumsvirksomhet på kontinentalsokkelen](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1990-12-21-72.md) | Lov om avgift på utslipp av CO2 | 1990-12-21 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1990-12-21-72.md) |
| [Lov om avgift til statskassen på inngangspenger til forestillinger og framvisnin](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1966-06-10-3.md) | Lov om avgift på forestillinger m.v. |  | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1966-06-10-3.md) |
| [Lov om avgifter vedrørende motorkjøretøyer og båter (motorkjøretøy- og båtavgift](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1959-06-19-2.md) | Motorkjøretøy- og båtavgiftsloven | 1959-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1959-06-19-2.md) |
| [Lov om beskyttelse av supplerende pensjonsrettigheter for arbeidstakere og selvs](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2001-12-14-95.md) | Lov om pensjonsrettigheter innen EØS | 2002-03-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2001-12-14-95.md) |
| [Lov om betaling og innkreving av skatte- og avgiftskrav (skattebetalingsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2005-06-17-67.md) | Skattebetalingsloven – sktbl | 2009-01-01, 2008-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2005-06-17-67.md) |
| [Lov om betalingssystemer m.v.](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1999-12-17-95.md) | Betalingssystemloven | 2000-04-14 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1999-12-17-95.md) |
| [Lov om bokføring (bokføringsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2004-11-19-73.md) | Bokføringsloven | 2005-01-01, 2006-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2004-11-19-73.md) |
| [Lov om deponering i gjeldshøve [deponeringslova]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1939-02-17-2.md) | Deponeringslova – depl | 1939-03-23 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1939-02-17-2.md) |
| [Lov om digital operasjonell motstandsdyktighet i finanssektoren (DORA-loven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-05-27-18.md) | DORA-loven | 2025-07-01, Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-05-27-18.md) |
| [Lov om dokumentavgift (dokumentavgiftsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1975-12-12-59.md) | Dokumentavgiftsloven – dal | 1976-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1975-12-12-59.md) |
| [Lov om eiendomsmegling (eiendomsmeglingsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2007-06-29-73.md) | Eiendomsmeglingsloven – emgll | 2008-01-01, 2011-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2007-06-29-73.md) |
| [Lov om eigedomsskatt til kommunane (eigedomsskattelova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1975-06-06-29.md) | Eigedomsskattelova | 1976-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1975-06-06-29.md) |
| [Lov om endringar i eigedomsskattelova](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-60.md) | Endringslov til eigedomsskattelova | 2025-06-20 med verknad frå skatteåret 2026 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-60.md) |
| [Lov om endringar i skatteforvaltningsloven](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-59.md) | Endringslov til skatteforvaltningsloven | 2025-06-20, 2025-06-20 med verknad frå skatteåret 2026 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-59.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i AIF-loven](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2026-02-06-4.md) | Endringslov til AIF-loven | 2026-04-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2026-02-06-4.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i Svalbardskatteloven](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-48.md) | Endringslov til Svalbardskatteloven | 2026-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-48.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i Svalbardskatteloven](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-12-22-118.md) | Endringslov til Svalbardskatteloven | 2025-12-22 med virkning fra inntektsåret 2026 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-12-22-118.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i finansforetaksloven (utvidelse av garantiordningen for skadef](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-12-22-125.md) | Endringslov til finansforetaksloven | Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-12-22-125.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i finansforetaksloven mv. (innskuddsgaranti og krisehåndtering ](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2018-03-23-2.md) | Endringslov til finansforetaksloven mv. | 2019-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2018-03-23-2.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i finansforetaksloven mv. (verdipapirisering og kreditorhierark](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2021-04-23-22.md) | Endringslov til finansforetaksloven mv. | 2021-07-01, 2025-08-01, Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2021-04-23-22.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i finansmarkedslovgivningen (samleproposisjon)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2024-06-25-60.md) | Endringslov til finansmarkedslovgivningen | 2024-07-01, 2024-08-01, 2024-10-01, 2025-01-01, 2025-04-01, 2025-08-01, Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2024-06-25-60.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i forsikringsvirksomhetsloven (skadeforsikring)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2010-12-17-84.md) | Endringslov til forsikringsvirksomhetsloven | Kongen bestemmer, 2011-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2010-12-17-84.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i lov 26. mars 1999 nr. 14 om skatt av formue og inntekt](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2006-12-15-81.md) | Endringslov til skatteloven | Kongen bestemmer, 2006-12-15, 2007-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2006-12-15-81.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i lov 26. mars 1999 nr. 14 om skatt av formue og inntekt (skatt](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2008-12-12-99.md) | Endringslov til skatteloven | Kongen bestemmer, 2008-12-12, 2009-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2008-12-12-99.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i lov 6. juni 1975 nr. 29 om eigedomsskatt til kommunane (eiged](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2017-12-19-118.md) | Endringslov til eigedomsskattelova | 2017-12-19 med virkning fra skatteåret 2019 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2017-12-19-118.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i lov om Statens pensjonsfond](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2023-12-20-104.md) | Endringslov til lov om Statens pensjonsfond | Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2023-12-20-104.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i merverdiavgiftsloven](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-12-22-121.md) | Endringslov til merverdiavgiftsloven | 2026-01-01, 2026-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-12-22-121.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i regnskapsloven mv. (bærekraftsrapportering)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2024-06-21-42.md) | Endringslov til regnskapsloven mv. | 2024-11-01, Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2024-06-21-42.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i sentralbankloven og finansieringsvirksomhetsloven og om opphe](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2003-06-20-44.md) | Endringslov til sentralbankloven m.fl | Kongen bestemmer, 2004-01-01, 2005-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2003-06-20-44.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i skatte- og avgiftslovgivningen mv.](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2004-12-10-77.md) | Endringslov til skatte- og avgiftslovgivningen mv. | 2004-12-10, 2005-01-01, 2005-04-11, 2005-07-01, 2005-08-01, 2006-01-01, 2008-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2004-12-10-77.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i skattebetalingsloven](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-63.md) | Endringslov til skattebetalingsloven | 2025-06-20, 2026-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-63.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i skattebetalingsloven](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-12-22-120.md) | Endringslov til skattebetalingsloven | 2025-12-22 med virkning fra inntektsåret 2025, 2025-12-22 med virkning fra inntektsåret 2026 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-12-22-120.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i skatteforvaltningsloven](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-64.md) | Endringslov til skatteforvaltningsloven | 2025-06-20, 2026-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-64.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i skatteloven](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2011-12-09-52.md) | Endringslov til skatteloven | 2011-12-09, 2012-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2011-12-09-52.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i skatteloven](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2024-01-12-2.md) | Endringslov til skatteloven | 2024-01-12 med virkning fra og med inntektsåret 2024, Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2024-01-12-2.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i skatteloven](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-12-22-119.md) | Endringslov til skatteloven | 2025-12-22, 2025-12-22 med virkning fra inntektsåret 2025, 2025-12-22 med virkning fra 2025-10-15, 2025-12-22 med virkning fra inntektsåret 2026 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-12-22-119.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i verdipapirhandelloven (forskriftshjemmel om tilbudsprisen ved](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2020-04-24-32.md) | Endringslov til verdipapirhandelloven og pakkereiseloven | 2020-04-24, Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2020-04-24-32.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i verdipapirhandelloven mv. (kapitalkrav for verdipapirforetak)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2026-02-06-3.md) | Endringslov til verdipapirhandelloven mv. | Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2026-02-06-3.md) |
| [Lov om fastsettelse av finansielle referanseverdier (referanseverdiloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2015-12-04-95.md) | Referanseverdiloven | 2016-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2015-12-04-95.md) |
| [Lov om finansforetak og finanskonsern (finansforetaksloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2015-04-10-17.md) | Finansforetaksloven | 2016-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2015-04-10-17.md) |
| [Lov om finansiell sikkerhetsstillelse](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2004-03-26-17.md) | Lov om finansiell sikkerhetsstillelse | 2004-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2004-03-26-17.md) |
| [Lov om folkefinansiering av næringsvirksomhet (folkefinansieringsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2026-02-06-2.md) | Folkefinansieringsloven | Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2026-02-06-2.md) |
| [Lov om folkeregistrering (folkeregisterloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2016-12-09-88.md) | Folkeregisterloven | 2017-10-01, 2020-10-05 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2016-12-09-88.md) |
| [Lov om foretakspensjon (foretakspensjonsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2000-03-24-16.md) | Foretakspensjonsloven – ftpensjl | 2001-01-01, 2000-03-24 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2000-03-24-16.md) |
| [Lov om forsikringsformidling (forsikringsformidlingsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2021-12-22-163.md) | Forsikringsformidlingsloven | 2022-01-01, 2022-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2021-12-22-163.md) |
| [Lov om forsikringsvirksomhet (forsikringsvirksomhetsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2005-06-10-44.md) | Forsikringsvirksomhetsloven – forsvl | 2006-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2005-06-10-44.md) |
| [Lov om forvaltning av alternative investeringsfond](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2014-06-20-28.md) | AIF-loven | 2014-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2014-06-20-28.md) |
| [Lov om godtgjøring og andre ytelser til stortingsrepresentanter (representantyte](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-57.md) | Representantytelsesloven | 2025-10-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-57.md) |
| [Lov om individuell pensjonsordning](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2008-06-27-62.md) | Lov om individuell pensjonsordning | 2008-06-27, 2008-12-31 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2008-06-27-62.md) |
| [Lov om informasjonstilgang for Riksrevisjonen ved undersøkelser av saker som gje](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2022-06-17-49.md) | Lov om informasjonstilgang for Riksrevisjonen | 2022-06-17, 2022-12-31 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2022-06-17-49.md) |
| [Lov om inn- og utførsel av varer (vareførselsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2022-03-11-9.md) | Vareførselsloven – vfl. | 2023-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2022-03-11-9.md) |
| [Lov om innkreving av statlige krav mv. (innkrevingsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-04-25-12.md) | Innkrevingsloven | 2026-01-01, 2027-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-04-25-12.md) |
| [Lov om innskuddspensjon i arbeidsforhold (innskuddspensjonsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2000-11-24-81.md) | Innskuddspensjonsloven – innskpensjl | 2001-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2000-11-24-81.md) |
| [Lov om kompensasjon av merverdiavgift for kommuner, fylkeskommuner mv. (merverdi](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2003-12-12-108.md) | Merverdiavgiftskompensasjonsloven | 2004-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2003-12-12-108.md) |
| [Lov om krav til kassasystem (kassasystemlova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2015-06-19-58.md) | Kassasystemlova | 2017-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2015-06-19-58.md) |
| [Lov om kredittvurderingsbyråer](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2014-06-20-30.md) | Lov om kredittvurderingsbyråer | 2015-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2014-06-20-30.md) |
| [Lov om kryptoeiendeler (kryptoeiendelsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-05-27-20.md) | Kryptoeiendelsloven | 2025-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-05-27-20.md) |
| [Lov om låneformidling (låneformidlingsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2022-12-16-91.md) | Låneformidlingsloven | 2023-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2022-12-16-91.md) |
| [Lov om lønnsstøtte (økonomiske tiltak i møte med pandemien)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2022-01-28-2.md) | Lov om lønnsstøtte (økonomiske tiltak i møte med pandemien) | 2022-02-04 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2022-01-28-2.md) |
| [Lov om merverdiavgift (merverdiavgiftsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2009-06-19-58.md) | Merverdiavgiftsloven – mval | 2010-01-01, 2011-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2009-06-19-58.md) |
| [Lov om midlertidig kompensasjonsordning for arbeidsgivere med nullsats for bereg](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2020-06-23-110.md) | Lov om midl. kompensasjon ved nullsats for arbeidsgiveravgift | 2020-06-23 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2020-06-23-110.md) |
| [Lov om midlertidig tillegg til lov av 13. juni 1975 nr. 35 om skattlegging av un](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1983-12-23-76.md) | Tilleggslov til petroleumsskatteloven | 1983-12-23 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1983-12-23-76.md) |
| [Lov om midlertidig tilskuddsordning for foretak med stort omsetningsfall](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2020-04-17-23.md) | Lov om midl. tilskuddsordning ved omsetningsfall | 2020-04-17 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2020-04-17-23.md) |
| [Lov om nøkkelinformasjon om sammensatte og forsikringsbaserte investeringsproduk](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2024-06-21-40.md) | PRIIPs-loven | 2024-10-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2024-06-21-40.md) |
| [Lov om obligatorisk tjenestepensjon [OTP-loven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2005-12-21-124.md) | OTP-loven | 2006-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2005-12-21-124.md) |
| [Lov om offentliggjøring av bærekraftsinformasjon i finanssektoren og et rammever](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2021-12-22-161.md) | Lov om offentliggjøring av bærekraftsinformasjon i finanssektoren mv. | 2023-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2021-12-22-161.md) |
| [Lov om offisiell statistikk og Statistisk sentralbyrå (statistikkloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2019-06-21-32.md) | Statistikkloven | 2019-11-01, 2020-01-01, 2021-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2019-06-21-32.md) |
| [Lov om oppheving av lov 19. juni 1964 nr. 14 om avgift på arv og visse gaver (ar](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2013-12-13-110.md) | Oppheving av arveavgiftsloven | 2014-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2013-12-13-110.md) |
| [Lov om oppheving av lov om avgift på utslipp av CO2i petroleumsvirksomhet på kon](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2023-12-20-96.md) | Endringslov til lov om avgift på utslipp av CO2 | Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2023-12-20-96.md) |
| [Lov om register over opplysninger om valutaveksling og overføring av betalingsmi](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2004-05-28-29.md) | Valutaregisterloven – valregl | 2005-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2004-05-28-29.md) |
| [Lov om register over reelle rettighetshavere](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2019-03-01-2.md) | Lov om register over reelle rettighetshavere | 2021-11-01, 2024-10-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2019-03-01-2.md) |
| [Lov om regnskapsførere (regnskapsførerloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2022-12-16-90.md) | Regnskapsførerloven | 2023-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2022-12-16-90.md) |
| [Lov om revisjon og revisorer (revisorloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2020-11-20-128.md) | Revisorloven | 2021-01-01, 2021-05-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2020-11-20-128.md) |
| [Lov om sjøtrygdelag [sjøtrygdelagloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1953-07-03-2.md) | Sjøtrygdelagloven | 1953-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1953-07-03-2.md) |
| [Lov om skatt av formue og inntekt (skatteloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1999-03-26-14.md) | Skatteloven – sktl | 2000-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1999-03-26-14.md) |
| [Lov om skatt på honorar til utenlandske artister mv (artistskatteloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1996-12-13-87.md) | Artistskatteloven | Inntektsåret 1998 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1996-12-13-87.md) |
| [Lov om skatt til Svalbard (Svalbardskatteloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1996-11-29-68.md) | Svalbardskatteloven – svalbsktl | 1998-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1996-11-29-68.md) |
| [Lov om skatteforvaltning (skatteforvaltningsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2016-05-27-14.md) | Skatteforvaltningsloven – sktfvl | 2017-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2016-05-27-14.md) |
| [Lov om skattlegging av personer på Jan Mayen og i Antarktis (Jan Mayen-skattelov](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1996-11-29-69.md) | Jan Mayen-skatteloven | 1998-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1996-11-29-69.md) |
| [Lov om skattlegging av undersjøiske petroleumsforekomster mv. (petroleumsskattel](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1975-06-13-35.md) | Petroleumsskatteloven – petrsktl |  | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1975-06-13-35.md) |
| [Lov om suppleringsskatt på underbeskattet inntekt i konsern (suppleringsskattelo](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2024-01-12-1.md) | Suppleringsskatteloven | 2024-01-12 med virkning fra og med inntektsåret 2024 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2024-01-12-1.md) |
| [Lov om særavgifter (særavgiftsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1933-05-19-11.md) | Særavgiftsloven | 1933-05-19 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1933-05-19-11.md) |
| [Lov om tilskudd ved avbrutt permittering (økonomiske tiltak i møte med virusutbr](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2020-06-23-99.md) | Lov om tilskudd ved avbrutt permittering | 2020-06-23 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2020-06-23-99.md) |
| [Lov om tiltak mot hvitvasking og terrorfinansiering (hvitvaskingsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2018-06-01-23.md) | Hvitvaskingsloven – hvvl | 2018-10-15 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2018-06-01-23.md) |
| [Lov om tjenestepensjon (tjenestepensjonsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2013-12-13-106.md) | Tjenestepensjonsloven | 2014-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2013-12-13-106.md) |
| [Lov om tollavgift (tollavgiftsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2022-03-11-8.md) | Tollavgiftsloven – tavl | 2023-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2022-03-11-8.md) |
| [Lov om valutaregulering [valutalova]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1950-07-14-10.md) | Valutalova – valutal |  | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1950-07-14-10.md) |
| [Lov om verdipapirfond (verdipapirfondloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2011-11-25-44.md) | Verdipapirfondloven | 2012-01-01, 2012-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2011-11-25-44.md) |
| [Lov om verdipapirhandel (verdipapirhandelloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2007-06-29-75.md) | Verdipapirhandelloven – vphl | 2007-11-01, 2008-01-01, 2008-11-01, 2009-03-16 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2007-06-29-75.md) |
| [Lov om verdipapirsentraler og verdipapiroppgjør mv. (verdipapirsentralloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2019-03-15-6.md) | Verdipapirsentralloven | 2020-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2019-03-15-6.md) |
| [Lov om årsregnskap m.v. (regnskapsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1998-07-17-56.md) | Regnskapsloven – rskl | 1999-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1998-07-17-56.md) |
| [Midlertidig lov om tillegg til merverdiavgiftsloven](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2017-12-19-126.md) | Midlertidig lov om tillegg til merverdiavgiftsloven | 2018-01-01 – 2027-12-31 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2017-12-19-126.md) |
